C/C FOR CONTINUED JURY TRIAL, COURT, JURY AND PLAINTIFF COUNSEL PRESENT AS HERETOFORE, NO APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT KEVIN LEE. COURT ORDERED ATTEMPTS TO CONTACT DEFENDANT ARE UNSUCCESSFUL. COURT AND COUNSEL PRESENT DISCUSS JURY INSTRUCTIONS AND VERDICT FORM. COURT INSTRUCTS JURY. AT 9:27 A.M. THE JURY RETIRES TO DELIBERATE ACCOMPANIED BY A SWORN OFFICER OF THE COURT. AT 10:05 A.M. THE JURY RETURNS TO THE COURTROOM WITH A VERDICT, TO WIT: COURT AND CAUSE. WE, THE JURY, FIND FOR THE PLAINTIFF IN THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION. DATE: SEP 26 2000. SIGNED WILLIAM REILLY, FOREPERSON. COURT POLLS JURY AND ALL RESPOND IN THE AFFIRMATIVE. COURT ORDERS THE VERDICT FILED. JURORS THANKED AND EXCUSED. EXHIBITS ORDERED RETURNED FOR SAFEKEEPING. PLAINTIFF COUNSEL TO PREPARE JUDGMENT
